zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Grancey於大約1353年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達格朗希勒-a奧-維爾時，她的父親Eudes VI de Grancey22歲，母親Yolande de Bar13歲。她於1365年與Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain在法國布格o-達格朗希勒-a奧結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1423年在法國德 艾斯特豪-馬內a奧維利亞享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Grancey于大约1353年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達格朗希勒-a奧-維爾时，她的父亲Eudes VI de Grancey22岁，母亲Yolande de Bar13岁。她于1365年与Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain在法国布格o-達格朗希勒-a奧结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1423年在法国德 艾斯特豪-馬內a奧維利亞享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grancey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Roscommon): variant of Glancy , from Mag Fhlannchaidh (see Clancy ).

variants.name: Glancy
meanings: Irish (Roscommon and Leitrim): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Fhlannchaidh ‘son of Flannchadh’ (see Clancy ).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Grancey was born about 1353, in Grancey-le-Château-Neuvelle, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Eudes VI de Grancey, was 22 and her mother, Yolande de Bar, was 13. She married Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain in 1365, in Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1423, in Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, France, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Grancey est née environ 1353, à Grancey-le-Château-Neuvelle, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Eudes VI de Grancey, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Bar, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain en 1365, à Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1423, à Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Grancey um 1353 in Grancey-le-Château-Neuvelle, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eudes VI de Grancey 22 und ihre Mutter Yolande de Bar 13. Sie hat 1365 in Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1423 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Grancey è nata il circa 1353 nel Grancey-le-Château-Neuvelle, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Eudes VI de Grancey, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Yolande de Bar, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain nel 1365, nel Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1423, nel Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Granceyが約1353年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルグランセイ-レ-チaテアウ-ネウベルで生まれた時，父Eudes VI de Granceyは22歳，母Yolande de Barは13歳であった。1365年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルグランセイ-レ-チaテアウでJean II de Thil-Châteauvillainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1423年にフランスグランド エストハウテ-マルンチaテアウヴィレインで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Grancey(이)가 대략 1353년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 그랜스이-레-cha테오-니우벨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eudes VI de Grancey(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolande de Bar(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1365년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 그랜스이-레-cha테오에서 Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1423년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 하테-마니 cha테오비린에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.environ 1353–environ 1423: tany ho any amin'ny 1353–tany ho any amin'ny 1423

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Grancey nasceu aproximadamente 1353, em Grancey-le-Château-Neuvelle, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Eudes VI de Grancey, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Bar, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain em 1365, em Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1423, em Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, França, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Grancey родилась около 1353 г. в местности гранси-ле-чaто-неувелл, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Eudes VI de Grancey было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Bar, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain в 1365 г. в местности гранси-ле-чaто, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1423 г. в местности чaтовиллеин, хауте-марн, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 72 лет.

sm.environ 1353–environ 1423: e tusa o le 1353–e tusa o le 1423

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Grancey nació aproximadamente 1353, en Grancey-le-Château-Neuvelle, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Eudes VI de Grancey, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Yolande de Bar, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain en 1365, en Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1423, en Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, Francia, a la edad de 72 años.
